name: API key authentication (global x-api-key)
recommended_next_step: Replace with cookie/session auth or signed stream tokens; remove key-in-URL.

name: Overview dashboard (counts + usage + charts)
blockers: Cost requires COST_PER_1K_TOKENS_USD to be set meaningfully
Overview aggregation may not scale (loads 6 months of MessageJobs)
recommended_next_step: Move aggregation into DB or pre-aggregates; add pagination/limits.

name: Company management (create/edit/delete)
blockers: POST /companies does not await persistence and lacks validation/uniqueness UX
recommended_next_step: Await create; validate inputs; return 409 on slug conflicts.

name: Company brief (context artifact: company_brief)
blockers: Cannot clear brief (PUT requires non-empty body)
recommended_next_step: Add DELETE /brief or allow empty to mean delete.

name: Project management (create/edit/delete, force delete)
blockers: Validation minimal; IDs/slugs can be arbitrary
recommended_next_step: Add server-side validation and consistent UI flows (single source of truth).

name: Project brief (context artifact: project_brief)
blockers: Cannot clear brief (PUT requires non-empty body)
recommended_next_step: Add DELETE /brief or allow empty to mean delete.

name: Sessions (create/list/rename)
recommended_next_step: Define session model: either local-only, or integrate with Hermes sessions API if available.

name: Messaging (user + assistant timeline via GuidanceEvent)
evidence: apps/dashboard-api/index.js (POST /messages creates GuidanceEvent + MessageJob; processMessageJob persists assistant_message)
blockers: Not multi-turn; no conversation history sent to Hermes
Jobs are in-process; no resume on restart
recommended_next_step: Implement durable job worker and multi-turn message replay/windowing.

name: Message job streaming (SSE)
blockers: No robust fallback when SSE is unauthorized
recommended_next_step: Replace EventSource auth approach and add automatic fallback to polling.

name: Issues page
recommended_next_step: Define 'issue' sources (failed jobs, timeouts, stalled sessions) and implement list + filters.
